description.content: Standard endpoint returning latest exchange rates from a base currency to all supported currencies.
Returns the latest exchange rates from a given base currency to all supported currencies. Update frequency depends on plan tier (daily on Free, hourly on Pro, every 5 minutes on Business / Volume).

variable.description: (Required) Your ExchangeRate-API dashboard API key.
(Required) ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the base currency (e.g. USD).

response.name: Successful response with conversion rates for the base currency.

Pair conversion enriched with target currency locale, name, symbol, and flag (Business / Volume plans only).

Returns the exchange rate between a base and target currency along with enriched target currency metadata (country locale, two-letter country code, currency name, display symbol, flag URL). Only available on Business and Volume plans.

(Required) ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the base currency (e.g. USD).
(Required) ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the target currency (e.g. EUR).

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Historical exchange rates for a specific date back to 1990 (Pro / Business / Volume plans only).

Returns historical exchange rates for the given base currency on the specified date. Full currency support from 2021-01-01 onward; 35 currencies are available from 1990-01-01 to 2020-12-31. Only available on Pro, Business, and Volume plans.

variable.description: (Required) Your ExchangeRate-API dashboard API key.
(Required) ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the base currency (e.g. USD).
(Required) Year for historical data (full four-digit year).
(Required) Month for historical data (1-12, no leading zero).
(Required) Day for historical data (1-31, no leading zero).

response.name: Successful response with historical rates for the given date.

Free no-key endpoint with once-daily rates and attribution requirement.

Returns the latest exchange rates from a base currency via the no-API-key Open Access endpoint (https://open.er-api.com/v6). Requires attribution back to exchangerate-api.com. Updates once daily and is rate limited.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

ExchangeRate-API is a currency exchange rate API providing authoritative daily and intraday foreign exchange rates for 161 currencies. The v6 API surface includes Standard (Latest) rates, Pair conversion, Enriched data (locale, symbol, flag), Historical rates back to 1990, Supported codes, and an API request Quota endpoint. A separate no-key Open Access endpoint (open.er-api.com) provides once-daily rates with attribution.

Contact Support:
 Name: ExchangeRate-API Support
 Email: contact@exchangerate-api.com
